title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: An EO interview profiles Corgi co-founders Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, who rebuilt the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy carriers. The 25-year-old founders raised 108M in Series A funding and achieved projected several hundred million ARR by maintaining ambition through two years of regulatory challenges.
